description: GitHub projects accepting sponsors or seeking contributors — researched April 2026
sources: GitHub API: high-star projects with open contribution channels

projects.name: open-webui / open-webui
projects.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, Llama, etc.)
projects.potential_earnings: Variable via GitHub Sponsors — depends on sponsored maintainer tier and userbase size. The project has 132k+ stars, active community.
projects.notes: Very active project with 18.8k forks, frequent releases. Fast-moving AI UI space. Contributions can earn recognition in a high-growth open-source AI project.

projects.name: yt-dlp / yt-dlp
projects.sponsorship_program: GitHub Sponsors (org level) + possible financial support via Patreon/OpenCollective links in README
what_help_needed: New extractor development for video sites
projects.potential_earnings: GitHub Sponsors + GitHub Discussions activity can lead to recognition. Popular project — contributors gain significant visibility. No formal bounty program but strong community recognition.
projects.notes: High-volume bug queue (2476 open issues). Great for Python contributors wanting real-world scraping/extraction experience. Active Discord community.

projects.name: excalidraw / excalidraw
projects.description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams
projects.potential_earnings: GitHub Sponsors tier for contributors with sustained contributions. excalidraw.com has a paid product — contributors to core library gain visibility with potential future employment/contracting.
projects.notes: Massive community (121k stars). Very active issues. Excellent for building portfolio with TypeScript/React experience.

projects.name: axios / axios
projects.description: Promise based HTTP client for browser and node.js
projects.potential_earnings: Maintainers accept GitHub Sponsors. High-profile JavaScript library — contributor recognition is significant for resume/portfolio.
projects.notes: 268 open issues, manageable. JavaScript/TypeScript HTTP library used by millions of projects. Great for understanding core networking concepts.

projects.name: affaan-m / everything-claude-code
projects.description: Agent harness performance optimization system for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond
projects.potential_earnings: Active development — potential GitHub Sponsors if maintainer has it set up. Fast-growing repo (160k stars in ~3 months).
projects.notes: Rapid growth repo in AI agent tooling space. Good opportunity for JavaScript developers interested in AI agent frameworks.

projects.name: louislam / uptime-kuma
what_help_needed: Bug fixes (database connection pooling issues reported)
projects.potential_earnings: Louis Lam has active GitHub Sponsors. Contributions recognized with sponsor tier benefits possible for frequent contributors.
projects.notes: Well-known self-hosted tool. Active community. Maintainer is responsive and has working sponsorship program.

projects.name: openclaw / openclaw
projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way.
projects.potential_earnings: Large star base (360k stars) with active GitHub Sponsors. Potential for contributor sponsorship tiers as program matures.
projects.notes: Massive star count, 73k forks. Fast-moving AI assistant framework. Huge opportunity for TypeScript/Node developers in AI agent space.

projects.name: fatedier / frp
projects.description: A fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the internet
projects.potential_earnings: Maintainer has GitHub Sponsors. Clean, well-structured Go project — great for portfolio. 41 open issues = manageable workload.
projects.notes: 106k stars, 15k forks. Very stable project with steady contributions. Good for Go developers wanting production-grade networking experience.

projects.name: tech-interview-handbook / tech-interview-handbook
projects.description: Curated coding interview preparation materials for busy software engineers
what_help_needed: Content updates for current interview trends
projects.potential_earnings: Popular developer resource with active sponsor. Non-code contributions welcome (content, corrections, translations). Recognition in developer community.
projects.notes: 138k stars. Low issue count (44). Great for non-coding contributions: writing, editing, translating content.

projects.name: schodet / nxt-python
projects.description: Python library for LEGO Mindstorms NXT robots
what_help_needed: Bluetooth connection fixes for newer macOS versions
projects.potential_earnings: No formal sponsorship detected. Opportunity for hands-on hardware/Python testing contributions. Good for beginners.
projects.notes: Small but active project explicitly seeking volunteer testers on specific platforms. Good entry point for contributors wanting hardware/embedded experience.

best_for_earning_recognition: frp (clean Go project, maintainer sponsorship active)
key_opportunities_summary.bounty_programs_note: GitHub Sponsors is the primary monetization vehicle for these projects. No dedicated bounty programs (like Bountysource or IssueHunt) were detected in API searches. Consider reaching out to project maintainers directly for paid contracting work.
